patterns.integration_test_pattern: Integration tests use repo_root(), build_jc(), bop_bin() helper functions and tempfile::tempdir() for isolation
patterns.test_execution: Tests run the actual bop binary via Command::new(bop_bin())
patterns.card_verification: Use fs::read_dir to check for card existence in .cards/pending/ directory

existing_implementations.description: serve.rs has unit tests using Tower oneshot, but the smoke test is marked #[ignore] due to port binding race conditions

test_strategy.approach: Create a new integration test file that spawns the bop serve process, waits for it to be ready, POSTs a card creation request via HTTP client (reqwest), verifies the card directory exists, and cleans up
test_strategy.port_handling: Use a fixed test port (18080) to avoid race conditions
test_strategy.process_management: Spawn server as child process, wait for readiness, kill after test
